⚪ Not Started

{tasks .filter(t => (t.status || "todo") === "todo") .map(t => (

{t.title || t.text}

{t.description}

))}

🔵 In Progress

{tasks .filter(t => t.status === "progress") .map(t => (

{t.title}

))}

🟢 Done

{tasks .filter(t => t.status === "done") .map(t => (

{t.title}

))}
